rules.name: person_complex_title_in_case
rules.description: Captures names with complex titles (Dr., Hon.-Prof., etc.) following 'durch den Richter' or 'in der Beschwerdesache'. Uses numbered capture group for the name.

rules.name: person_after_genitive_role
rules.description: Captures names following genitive role markers like 'des Beschwerdeführers', 'der Antragstellerin'. Uses numbered capture group.

rules.name: person_simple_name_context
rules.description: Captures simple names (First Last) in contexts like 'in der Beschwerdesache' where no title is present. Uses numbered capture group.

rules.name: person_after_preposition
rules.description: Captures names following prepositions like 'von', 'durch', 'gegen', 'in', 'an', 'bei', 'nach', 'zu', 'auf'. Uses numbered capture group.

rules.name: person_title_prefix_general
rules.description: Captures names starting with specific titles like ÖkR, HR, Priv.-Doz. in any context. Uses numbered capture group.

rules.name: person_genitive_simple
rules.description: Captures names following genitive markers 'der' or 'des' (e.g., 'des Hilde Lederhas'). Uses numbered capture group.
